intake.user_request: On branch feature/source-headers-dogfood: (1) run populate-coderef . to rebuild graph.json with @semantic metadata, (2) run rag-index to rebuild vectors from the enriched graph, (3) run a discovery query with CODEREF_LLOYD_DISCOVERY_RAG=1 against a real workorder topic and verify semantic_context is populated with meaningful hits.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Validation/investigation run on a feature branch. No code changes to coderef-core logic. Single execution sequence: populate + rag-index + query + report.

in_scope: npx populate-coderef . (rebuild graph.json with @semantic metadata from stamped source files)
npx rag-index (rebuild vectors from enriched graph)
Run discovery query with CODEREF_LLOYD_DISCOVERY_RAG=1 on topic 'output-validator file-grain aggregation'
Report: hits returned, fields populated, e2e pipeline working Y/N
out_of_scope: Changes to rag-index or populate-coderef logic

constraints: Must run on feature/source-headers-dogfood branch (not main)
